blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,313 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
